.clickable-icon.background: rgb(163, 213, 170) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.clickable-icon.graph-controls-button.background: rgb(163, 213, 170) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(248, 246, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(252, 254, 243) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #fcfef3 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#fcfef3, color-mix(in srgb, #fcfef3 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #fcfef3 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#fcfef3, color-mix(in srgb, #fcfef3 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(252, 254, 243) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(252, 254, 243) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(197, 65, 40, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(197, 65, 40, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(197, 65, 40, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(163, 213, 170) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(252, 254, 243) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(163, 213, 170) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(163, 213, 170) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(163, 213, 170) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(212, 228, 241) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(252, 254, 243) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(248, 246, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(243, 247, 228) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(243, 247, 228) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
